# viettelidc_ovpc_volume (Resource)

ViettelIDC Block Storage Volume.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `size` (Number) Volume size in GiB.

### Optional

- `volume_type` (String) Volume type, e.g. SSD / HDD.
- `vpc_id` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
